title: Goodyear Min Air Compressor
description: The Goodyear compact air compressor is a lightweight item ideal for inflating tyres sporting and camping equipment it measures up to 250 PSI and is complete 3 nozzles for differet tasks it is 12DC and is powered by connecting to your cars lighter socket the cord is 3 metres long.
